using System;

using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using SourceGen.Ioc;

namespace TestNamespace;

partial class TestContainer : IIocContainer<global::TestNamespace.TestContainer>, IServiceProvider, IKeyedServiceProvider, IServiceProviderIsService, IServiceProviderIsKeyedService, ISupportRequiredService, IServiceScopeFactory, IServiceScope, IDisposable, IAsyncDisposable
{
    private readonly bool _isRootScope = true;
    private int _disposed;

    #region Constructors

    /// <summary>
    /// Creates a new standalone container without external service provider fallback.
    /// </summary>
    public TestContainer()
    {
    }

    private TestContainer(TestContainer parent)
    {
        _isRootScope = false;
        _testNamespace_UserService = parent._testNamespace_UserService;
    }

    #endregion

    #region Service Resolution

    private global::TestNamespace.UserService? _testNamespace_UserService;
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _testNamespace_UserServiceSemaphore = new(1, 1);
    private global::TestNamespace.UserService GetTestNamespace_UserService()
    {
        if (_testNamespace_UserService is not null) return _testNamespace_UserService;

        _testNamespace_UserServiceSemaphore.Wait();
        try
        {
            if (_testNamespace_UserService is not null) return _testNamespace_UserService;

            var instance = new global::TestNamespace.UserService(GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_());

            _testNamespace_UserService = instance;
            return instance;
        }
        finally
        {
            _testNamespace_UserServiceSemaphore.Release();
        }
    }

    private global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>? _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_;
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_Semaphore = new(1, 1);
    private global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User> GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_()
    {
        if (_testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_ is not null) return _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_;

        _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_Semaphore.Wait();
        try
        {
            if (_testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_ is not null) return _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_;

            var instance = new global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>();

            _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_ = instance;
            return instance;
        }
        finally
        {
            _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_Semaphore.Release();
        }
    }

    #endregion

    #region IServiceProvider

    public object? GetService(Type serviceType)
    {
        if(serviceType == typeof(IServiceProvider)) return this;
        if(serviceType == typeof(IServiceScopeFactory)) return this;
        if(serviceType == typeof(TestContainer)) return this;

        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IUserService)) return GetTestNamespace_UserService();
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IUserService)) return GetTestNamespace_UserService();
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>)) return GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_();
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>)) return GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_();

        return null;
    }

    #endregion

    #region IKeyedServiceProvider

    public object? GetKeyedService(Type serviceType, object? serviceKey)
    {
        var key = serviceKey ?? global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey;

        return null;
    }

    public object GetRequiredKeyedService(Type serviceType, object? serviceKey)
    {
        return GetKeyedService(serviceType, serviceKey) ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"No service for type '{serviceType}' with key '{serviceKey}' has been registered.");
    }

    #endregion

    #region ISupportRequiredService

    public object GetRequiredService(Type serviceType)
    {
        return GetService(serviceType) ?? throw new InvalidOperationException($"No service for type '{serviceType}' has been registered.");
    }

    #endregion

    #region IServiceProviderIsService

    public bool IsService(Type serviceType)
    {
        if(serviceType == typeof(IServiceProvider)) return true;
        if(serviceType == typeof(IServiceScopeFactory)) return true;
        if(serviceType == typeof(TestContainer)) return true;

        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.UserService)) return true;
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IUserService)) return true;
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>)) return true;
        if(serviceType == typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>)) return true;

        return false;
    }

    public bool IsKeyedService(Type serviceType, object? serviceKey)
    {
        var key = serviceKey ?? global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey;

        return false;
    }

    #endregion

    #region IServiceScopeFactory

    public IServiceScope CreateScope() => new TestContainer(this);

    public AsyncServiceScope CreateAsyncScope() => new(CreateScope());

    IServiceProvider IServiceScope.ServiceProvider => this;

    #endregion

    #region IIocContainer

    public IReadOnlyCollection<KeyValuePair<(Type ServiceType, object Key), Func<global::TestNamespace.TestContainer, object>>> Services => _localServices;

    private static readonly KeyValuePair<(Type, object), Func<global::TestNamespace.TestContainer, object>>[] _localServices =
    [
        new((typeof(global::TestNamespace.UserService), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey), static c => c.GetTestNamespace_UserService()),
        new((typeof(global::TestNamespace.IUserService), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey), static c => c.GetTestNamespace_UserService()),
        new((typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey), static c => c.GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_()),
        new((typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>), global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.KeyedService.AnyKey), static c => c.GetTestNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_()),
    ];

    #endregion

    #region Disposal

    public void Dispose()
    {
        if(Interlocked.Exchange(ref _disposed, 1) != 0) return;

        if(!_isRootScope)
        {
            DisposeService(_testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_);
            _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_Semaphore.Dispose();
            return;
        }

        DisposeService(_testNamespace_UserService);
        _testNamespace_UserServiceSemaphore.Dispose();
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        if(Interlocked.Exchange(ref _disposed, 1) != 0) return;

        if(!_isRootScope)
        {
            await DisposeServiceAsync(_testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_);
            _testNamespace_Repository_TestNamespace_User_Semaphore.Dispose();
            return;
        }

        await DisposeServiceAsync(_testNamespace_UserService);
        _testNamespace_UserServiceSemaphore.Dispose();
    }

    private static async ValueTask DisposeServiceAsync(object? service)
    {
        if(service is IAsyncDisposable asyncDisposable) await asyncDisposable.DisposeAsync();
        else if(service is IDisposable disposable) disposable.Dispose();
    }

    private static void DisposeService(object? service)
    {
        if(service is IDisposable disposable) disposable.Dispose();
    }

    #endregion
}
